name: Seneca Foods Corporation
description: Seneca Foods Corporation is a leading provider of packaged fruits and vegetables, operating as a vertically-integrated food company. The organization manages the entire production process, from producing seeds and harvesting crops to manufacturing its own containers and distributing a wide range of nutritious food products. With a strong commitment to quality and sustainability, Seneca Foods partners with over 1,600 farms and orchards to deliver consistent, farm-fresh goodness to retail, foodservice, and industrial markets globally. The company is headquartered in Fairport, New York, and maintains numerous facilities throughout the United States.
